faqs.question: How can I contact SpaceWing customer support?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing offers multiple support channels: Our 24/7 hotline at 1-800-SPACE-WING (1-800-772-2394), email at support@spacewing.com (response within 4 hours), live chat on our website, WhatsApp at +1-321-SPACE-WING, and in-person support at any SpaceWing Experience Center. Premium customers have access to a dedicated concierge line.

faqs.question: What languages does customer support offer?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing customer support is available in English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Mandarin Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and Hindi. All written communications can be translated upon request. Our training programs and safety briefings are available in all supported languages with certified interpreters.

faqs.question: Can I schedule a consultation before booking?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer complimentary 45-minute consultations with Space Travel Advisors who can answer all your questions, explain mission options, discuss pricing, and help you choose the right experience. Consultations are available in-person at Experience Centers, via video call, or by phone. No obligation or commitment required.

faqs.question: What happens if I have questions during training?
faqs.answer: Each training group is assigned a dedicated Training Coordinator who serves as your primary point of contact. They're available 24/7 during your training period to address any questions or concerns. Our instructors are also always available, and we maintain a low student-to-instructor ratio for personalized attention.

faqs.question: Is there support for international travelers?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our International Traveler Services team assists with: visa applications (we provide invitation letters), travel arrangements to our launch sites, translation services, currency exchange guidance, and international payment processing. We have representatives in major cities worldwide who can assist with local arrangements.

faqs.question: How do I file a complaint or provide feedback?
faqs.answer: We welcome all feedback! Submit comments through our website feedback form, email feedback@spacewing.com, or speak with a supervisor at 1-800-SPACE-WING. All complaints are investigated within 48 hours with a response within 5 business days. Our Guest Relations team takes every concern seriously—we want your experience to be perfect.

faqs.question: Is there a customer support app?
faqs.answer: Yes! The SpaceWing app (available on iOS and Android) provides: booking management, countdown timer to your mission, training resources and checklists, live chat with support, flight status notifications, document storage, and direct access to your concierge. The app is especially useful during your training and mission countdown.

faqs.question: What support is available during my mission?
faqs.answer: During your mission, the crew is your primary support for any needs. Family members on Earth can contact our Family Support hotline for mission updates and assistance. Live mission support is available 24/7, and our ground team monitors every mission continuously. Post-flight, our team assists with documentation, photos, and any follow-up needs.

faqs.question: Do you offer accessibility support?
faqs.answer: Our Accessibility Services team specializes in accommodating travelers with disabilities or special needs. Services include: ASL interpreters, mobility assistance, modified training protocols, specialized equipment, dietary accommodations, and personalized support throughout your journey. We've successfully flown travelers with various accessibility needs—contact us to discuss your requirements.

faqs.question: How do I recover lost items after my flight?
faqs.answer: Contact our Lost & Found department at lostfound@spacewing.com or 1-800-SPACE-WING within 30 days. All items left on spacecraft are catalogued and stored for 90 days. We'll ship recovered items to you at no cost. For items lost at our facilities, each spaceport maintains a lost and found system. Most items are successfully reunited with their owners.
